---
title: "Suyeong Park"
subtitle: "Pharm.D., M.S. | Incoming PhD Student @ UTSW"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/subonge
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/psy97/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tommy02@snu.ac.kr
---

<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1rem;">

<img src="CV1.png" onclick="openModal(this.src)" style="width: 100%; display: block; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); cursor: zoom-in; transition: transform 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-6px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''" alt="CV Page 1"/>

<img src="CV2.png" onclick="openModal(this.src)" style="width: 100%; display: block; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); cursor: zoom-in; transition: transform 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-6px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''" alt="CV Page 2"/>

</div>

<div id="cv-modal" onclick="closeModal()" style="display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75); z-index:9999; justify-content:center; overflow-y:auto; padding:2rem 0;">
  <button onclick="closeModal()" style="position:fixed; top:1.2rem; right:1.2rem; background:white; border:none; border-radius:50%; width:2.2rem; height:2.2rem; font-size:1.2rem; cursor:pointer; z-index:10000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">✕</button>
  <img id="cv-modal-img" src="" onclick="toggleZoom(event)" style="display:block; margin:auto; max-width:90vw; max-height:90vh; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); cursor:zoom-in; transition:max-width 0.3s ease, max-height 0.3s ease;"/>
</div>

<script>
var zoomed = false;
function openModal(src) {
  var modal = document.getElementById('cv-modal');
  var img = document.getElementById('cv-modal-img');
  img.src = src;
  img.style.maxWidth = '90vw';
  img.style.maxHeight = '90vh';
  img.style.cursor = 'zoom-in';
  zoomed = false;
  modal.style.display = 'flex';
  modal.style.alignItems = 'center';
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function toggleZoom(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  var modal = document.getElementById('cv-modal');
  var img = document.getElementById('cv-modal-img');
  zoomed = !zoomed;
  if (zoomed) {
    img.style.maxWidth = '160vw';
    img.style.maxHeight = 'none';
    img.style.cursor = 'zoom-out';
    modal.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
    modal.scrollTop = 0;
  } else {
    img.style.maxWidth = '90vw';
    img.style.maxHeight = '90vh';
    img.style.cursor = 'zoom-in';
    modal.style.alignItems = 'center';
  }
}
function closeModal() {
  var img = document.getElementById('cv-modal-img');
  img.style.maxWidth = '90vw';
  img.style.maxHeight = '90vh';
  zoomed = false;
  document.getElementById('cv-modal').style.display = 'none';
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal();
});
</script>

<style>
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  div[style*="grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr"] {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}
</style>
